rationale: Educ. Code §45.255 governs school district credit enhancement bond applications and fees. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, appraised value thresholds, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict arises from the proposed exemption increase.
quote: Sec. 45.255. APPLICATION FOR CREDIT ENHANCEMENT. (a) A school district seeking credit enhancement of eligible bonds under this subchapter shall apply to the commissioner using a form adopted by the commissioner for the purpose.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts; no operative connection found.
